info.title: Bitbybit CAD Cloud API
info.description: High-performance parametric CAD model generation API. Supports multi-format output (STEP, GLTF, decomposed mesh), pipeline execution, file-based conversion, and async job processing.

post.description: Runs a single CAD operation by its fully-qualified identifier.

post.summary: Execute a chained pipeline of CAD operations
post.description: Runs multiple operations sequentially. Use '$ref:N' in params to reference step N's result.
Runs multiple independent operations in parallel.
Returns parameter schemas and defaults for the requested model names.
Generic endpoint — works for any registered model. See model-specific endpoints for fully typed parameters. Always returns 202 with a task ID for polling.

post.summary: Generate a batch of parametric models
post.description: Creates a compound task with one sub-task per item. Each item can have different parameters but shares the same output config.

get.description: Returns parameter schema, types, defaults, and limits for the specified model.

post.description: Parametric dragon-scale textured cup with twisted lofted body, voronoi-like skin cells, and configurable shell thickness. All parameters are optional — defaults produce a ready-to-print model.

Parametric 3D-printable desktop phone holder/stand with a lofted cradle surface, optional ornamental perforations, and a phone mock-up shape. All parameters are optional — defaults produce a ready-to-print model.

post.summary: Convert a STEP file to GLTF (.glb)
post.description: Simple STEP → glTF conversion using a previously uploaded file. Requires the 'convert' API key scope. Returns 202 with a task ID.

post.summary: Convert a STEP file to GLTF (.glb) - advanced options
post.description: Full-control STEP → glTF conversion with fine-grained mesh, export, and coordinate options. Requires the 'convert' API key scope. Returns 202 with a task ID.
Returns a pre-signed URL for uploading a file via PUT.

get.description: Returns paginated list of uploaded files.
Returns metadata and download URL for a single file.

delete.description: Permanently removes a file and its stored blob.

post.description: Confirms that the file was successfully uploaded to the pre-signed URL.

get.description: Returns the current status and metadata of a task.

delete.description: Cancels a waiting or queued task. Has no effect on completed/failed tasks.

get.description: Returns a download URL for the task's primary result. For compound tasks, returns a manifest with per-sub-task download links.

200.description: Result download link (standard) or compound manifest

get.summary: Get task result in a specific format
get.description: Returns a download URL for the requested output format (e.g. glb, step, stpz).

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Result format (e.g. glb, step, stpz, metadata, decomposed-mesh)

get.description: Returns download URLs for every available result format in a single call. Use this instead of making multiple requests to /result/{format}.

200.description: Download links for all available formats

post.summary: Retry a failed or cancelled task
post.description: Re-queues a failed or cancelled task with the same parameters.

409.description: Task is not in a retryable state

operation.description: Fully-qualified CAD operation identifier (e.g. 'occt.shapes.solid.createBox', 'manifold.primitives.cube', 'jscad.booleans.union'). Supports OCCT, Manifold, JSCAD, and vector/math operations.

params.description: Operation-specific parameters — varies by operation. See model definitions for available parameters.

ExecuteBody.description: Execute a single Bitbybit CAD operation. The operation runs asynchronously and returns a task ID for polling.

steps.description: Ordered list of CAD operations executed sequentially. Later steps can reference earlier results using '$ref:N' syntax.

outputs.description: Output format options applied to the final pipeline result. If omitted, raw result data is stored.

PipelineBody.description: Execute a chain of Bitbybit CAD operations sequentially. Each step can reference earlier step outputs via '$ref:N'. The final step's output is stored as the task result.

operation.description: Fully-qualified CAD operation identifier (e.g. 'occt.shapes.solid.createSphere'). Supports OCCT, Manifold, JSCAD, and vector/math operations.

params.description: Operation parameters. Use '$ref:N' (e.g. '$ref:0') to reference the output of a previous step by its zero-based index.

PipelineStep.description: A single step in a sequential CAD pipeline. Steps can reference outputs of earlier steps via $ref.

formats.description: Output formats to generate. Multiple formats can be requested (e.g. ['gltf', 'stpz']) — each produces a separate downloadable result. Do not include both 'step' and 'stpz' — only one STEP variant is supported per request.

meshPrecision.description: Tessellation precision for mesh-based outputs (decomposed-mesh and gltf). Lower values produce denser meshes. Only ignored when output is limited to step/stpz formats.

gltfMeshPrecision.description: Override tessellation precision specifically for glTF output. When set, takes precedence over meshPrecision for glTF only.

adjustYtoZ.description: Convert from Y-up to Z-up coordinate system in the output. Useful for software that expects Z-up.

OutputOptions.description: Controls which output formats are generated and their quality settings

OutputFormat.description: Output file format: 'step' (raw STEP), 'stpz' (gzip-compressed STEP), 'decomposed-mesh' (triangulated JSON), 'gltf' (glTF 2.0 binary .glb). Note: 'step' and 'stpz' are mutually exclusive — choose one or the other, not both.

parallel.description: Must be true — signals that items should be processed concurrently

items.description: List of independent CAD operations to execute in parallel. Each item becomes a sub-task.

CompoundExecuteBody.description: Execute multiple independent Bitbybit CAD operations in parallel. Each item runs as a separate sub-task and can be polled individually.

operation.description: Fully-qualified CAD operation identifier. Supports OCCT, Manifold, JSCAD, and vector/math operations.

inputFiles.description: References to previously uploaded files to be used as inputs for this operation

fileId.description: ID of a previously uploaded file (from POST /files/upload)

role.description: Role identifier for the file (e.g. 'step-input'). Determines how the file is used during processing.

outputFormats.description: Per-item output format overrides. If omitted, the task produces raw result data.

CompoundItem.description: A single operation within a compound (parallel) task. Each item runs independently.

names.description: Array of model slugs to fetch definitions for (e.g. ['dragon-cup', 'phone-nest'])

DefinitionsBody.description: Fetch parameter definitions for one or more parametric models. Returns available parameters, types, defaults, and constraints.

params.description: Model-specific parameters. Omitted params use their defaults. See model definition for available options.

ModelSubmissionBody.description: Submit a parametric model for generation with specified parameters and output formats

items.description: Array of parameter variations. Each item produces a separate output with the same model.

outputs.description: Output format configuration applied to every item in the batch

BatchModelSubmissionBody.description: Submit multiple parameter variations of the same model for parallel generation

DragonCupBody.description: Request body for the Dragon Cup model

radiusTopOffset.description: How much the top radius differs from bottom

nrSkinCellDivisionsTop.description: Subdivisions at top of each cell

nrSkinCellDivisionsBottom.description: Subdivisions at bottom of each cell

DragonCupParams.description: Dragon Cup model parameters — all optional, sane defaults apply

Point3.description: 3D point as [x, y, z] tuple, each coordinate in [-1000, 1000]

PhoneNestBody.description: Request body for the Phone Nest model

applyOrnaments.description: Add decorative perforations to the surface

PhoneNestParams.description: Phone Nest model parameters — all optional, sane defaults apply

stepFileId.description: ID of the previously uploaded STEP file (returned by the file upload endpoint)

meshPrecision.description: Tessellation precision controlling mesh density. Lower values produce finer meshes with more triangles.

StepToGltfBody.description: Convert a STEP file to glTF format with default settings. Upload the STEP file first, then pass its ID here.

stepFileId.description: ID of the previously uploaded STEP file (returned by the file upload endpoint)

options.description: Advanced conversion settings. If omitted, sensible defaults are used.

StepToGltfAdvancedBody.description: Convert a STEP file to glTF with full control over tessellation, naming, coordinate systems, and output format.

readColors.description: Extract color attributes from the STEP file and apply to glTF materials

readNames.description: Extract product/instance names from the STEP file and apply to glTF node names

readMaterials.description: Extract material definitions from the STEP file

readLayers.description: Extract layer/group structure from the STEP file

readProps.description: Extract custom properties (e.g. part numbers, metadata) from the STEP file

meshDeflection.description: Linear deflection for mesh tessellation — maximum allowed distance between the mesh and the true surface

meshAngle.description: Angular deflection for mesh tessellation (radians) — controls curvature approximation

meshParallel.description: Enable parallel tessellation for faster processing

faceCountThreshold.description: Maximum triangle count before LOD reduction kicks in. Set -1 to disable the limit entirely.

mergeFaces.description: Merge co-planar adjacent faces to reduce mesh complexity

splitIndices16.description: Split meshes so each uses 16-bit index buffers (max 65535 vertices per mesh). Improves compatibility with some renderers.

parallelWrite.description: Write glTF output in parallel for faster file generation

embedTextures.description: Embed texture data directly in the .glb file instead of referencing external URIs

forceUVExport.description: Generate UV coordinates even when no textures are present (useful for post-processing)

nodeNameFormat.description: Strategy for naming glTF nodes from STEP product/instance labels

meshNameFormat.description: Strategy for naming glTF meshes from STEP product/instance labels

transformFormat.description: Transform representation in glTF: 'compact' (default), 'mat4' (4x4 matrix), or 'trs' (translation/rotation/scale)

adjustZtoY.description: Convert from Z-up (CAD convention) to Y-up (glTF/WebGL convention) coordinate system

scale.description: Uniform scale factor applied to the entire model (e.g. 0.001 to convert mm to meters)

ConvertAdvancedOptions.description: Fine-grained options controlling STEP → glTF conversion: tessellation quality, attribute extraction, coordinate systems, and output format.

MeshAngle.description: Mesh angular deflection in radians. Range: [0.01, π]

GltfNameFormat.description: How node/mesh names are derived from STEP product/instance labels

filename.description: Original filename including extension (e.g. 'part.step', 'model.obj'). Used for display and format detection.

contentType.description: MIME type of the file (e.g. 'application/step', 'model/gltf-binary'). Must match the actual file content.

bytes.description: Exact file size in bytes. Must match the Content-Length of the subsequent PUT to the upload URL. Maximum: 1 GB.

sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the file content. When provided, enables server-side deduplication — if an identical file was previously uploaded under this API key, the existing file is reused and no upload is needed.

FileUploadBody.description: Request a pre-signed upload URL. After receiving the URL, PUT the raw file bytes to it within the expiration window.

HealthStatus.description: API health check result indicating overall system status

CadOperationResponse.description: Success envelope wrapping a Bitbybit CAD operation result

CadResultData.description: Operation-specific result data. Shape varies by the CAD algorithm executed (OCCT, Manifold, JSCAD, or vector/math operations).

ErrorDetail.description: Structured error information with machine-readable code and optional debugging context

ModelListResponse.description: Success envelope containing the list of available models

models.description: Available model slugs that can be used with the /models/{name} endpoints

ModelList.description: List of all available parametric models

ModelBatchDefinitionsResponse.description: Success envelope containing multiple model definitions

definitions.description: Model definitions keyed by slug. Each contains parameter schemas and defaults.

ModelBatchDefinitions.description: Definitions for multiple models in a single response

name.description: Model slug used in API paths (e.g. 'dragon-cup')

displayName.description: Human-friendly model name for UI display

description.description: What this model creates and its key characteristics

params.description: All accepted parameters with types, descriptions, and defaults

ModelDefinition.description: Full definition of a parametric model including all parameters and their constraints

name.description: Parameter name as used in the request body

type.description: Expected data type for this parameter

description.description: Human-readable explanation of what this parameter controls

default.description: Default value used when the parameter is omitted

items.description: Element type descriptor (only present for array parameters)

ModelParamDefinition.description: Schema definition for a single model parameter

ModelParamApiType.description: Data type of a model parameter: 'number' (float), 'integer' (whole number), 'boolean' (true/false), 'array' (list of values)

TaskAcceptedResponse.description: HTTP 202 response when a task is accepted for async processing

taskId.description: Unique task identifier — use this to poll for status and retrieve results

statusUrl.description: Relative URL to poll for task status updates

TaskCreatedResult.description: Returned when a CAD task is accepted. Poll the statusUrl to track progress.

CompoundTaskAcceptedResponse.description: HTTP 202 response when a compound (parallel) task is accepted

taskId.description: Parent compound task ID for tracking overall progress

subTaskCount.description: Total number of sub-tasks created (one per item in the request)

statusUrl.description: Relative URL to poll the parent task status

CompoundTaskCreatedResult.description: Returned when a compound (parallel) task is accepted. Contains initial status for all sub-tasks.

taskId.description: Unique identifier for this sub-task (can be polled individually)

index.description: Zero-based position of this sub-task within the compound

progress.description: Completion percentage (0–100) or null if not yet started

computeMs.description: Actual compute time in milliseconds (null until completed)

error.description: Error message if sub-task failed, null otherwise

downloadFormats.description: Available output format keys (e.g. ['glb', 'stpz']) for downloading results

SubTaskSummary.description: Status summary for one sub-task within a compound (parallel) task

TaskStatus.description: Task lifecycle state: waiting (pending dependencies), queued (in queue), processing (actively computing), completed (result available), failed (error occurred), cancelled (user-cancelled), expired (result TTL exceeded)

ModelDefinitionResponse.description: Success envelope containing a single model's definition

UploadResponse.description: Success envelope containing the pre-signed upload URL and file metadata

fileId.description: Assigned file identifier — use this to reference the file in subsequent API calls

uploadUrl.description: Pre-signed URL to PUT the raw file bytes to. Send the file content with Content-Type and Content-Length headers matching the request.

expiresIn.description: Seconds until the upload URL expires. You must complete the PUT within this window.

maxBytes.description: Maximum allowed file size in bytes for this upload. Determined by your plan tier.

UploadResult.description: Response after requesting a file upload. Contains the pre-signed URL to PUT your file to.

FileListResponse.description: Success envelope containing a paginated file list

FileList.description: Paginated list of uploaded files with total count

fileId.description: Unique file identifier used to reference this file in CAD operations

filename.description: Original filename as provided during upload request

contentType.description: MIME type of the file content

bytes.description: File size in bytes. Null while status is 'pending' (not yet uploaded).

sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the file content. Null if not provided during upload. Used for deduplication.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the upload was initiated

confirmedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the upload was confirmed. Null if not yet confirmed.

downloadUrl.description: Pre-signed download URL. Only present for confirmed files. Expires after 1 hour.

FileDetail.description: Full metadata for an uploaded file

FileStatus.description: File lifecycle state: 'pending' (upload URL issued, awaiting PUT), 'confirmed' (upload verified and file is usable), 'expired' (upload URL expired before completion)

FileDetailResponse.description: Success envelope containing a single file's metadata

DeleteResult.description: Confirmation that a resource was successfully deleted

ConfirmResponse.description: Success envelope confirming a file upload was verified

bytes.description: Actual file size in bytes as stored on the server

contentType.description: MIME type of the confirmed file

ConfirmResult.description: Returned after a file upload is verified. The file is now ready to be used in CAD operations.

TaskListResponse.description: Success envelope containing a paginated task list

TaskList.description: Paginated list of tasks with total count

taskId.description: Unique task identifier for polling and result retrieval

progress.description: Completion percentage (0–100) or null if progress is not tracked for this task kind

error.description: Error message when status is 'failed'. Null for all other statuses.

resultParts.description: Available result files keyed by format (e.g. 'glb', 'step'). Null until task completes.

metadata.description: Additional task metadata (e.g. resolved parameters, model name). Shape varies by task kind.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the task was created

startedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when processing began. Null if still queued.

finishedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the task completed (success or failure). Null if still running.

expiresAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when task results will be automatically deleted

TaskDetail.description: Complete task status including lifecycle timestamps, progress, and result metadata

TaskKind.description: Type of work: 'cad' (single operation), 'model' (parametric model), 'convert-simple'/'convert-advanced' (file conversion), 'pipeline' (sequential chain), 'compound' (parallel batch), 'tenant' (tenant-scoped)

mime.description: MIME type of the result file (e.g. 'model/gltf-binary', 'application/step')

bytes.description: Size of the result file in bytes

ResultPartMeta.description: Metadata about a single downloadable result part

TaskDetailResponse.description: Success envelope containing a single task's full details

CancelResult.description: Confirmation that a task was successfully cancelled

TaskOrCompoundResultResponse.description: Result download link for standard tasks, or a compound manifest with per-sub-task download links

TaskResultResponse.description: Success envelope containing a download link for a task result

downloadUrl.description: Pre-signed URL to download the result file. Expires after 1 hour.

TaskResultDownload.description: Download information for a completed task result

CompoundResultManifestResponse.description: Success envelope containing the compound task result manifest with per-sub-task download links

CompoundResultManifest.description: Result manifest for a completed compound task

downloadUrls.description: Download URLs keyed by format (only if completed)

CompoundResultEntry.description: Status/result info for one sub-task in a compound manifest

TaskResultsResponse.description: Success envelope containing download links for all result formats

downloadUrl.description: Pre-signed URL to download the result file. Expires after 1 hour.

downloads.description: Download links for all available result formats

TaskResultsDownload.description: Download information for all available result formats of a completed task

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key
ApiKeyAuth.description: Scoped API key. Scopes: models, cad, convert, * (wildcard). A key without the required scope receives 403 INSUFFICIENT_SCOPE.
